name: Makarov's Hound / torment
description:
Makarov still has power over you. He's still your master. You need information from him, but your task force might kill him first.

[REQUEST]

Story: 📖 📖

Spice: 🔥

Toxic: 🔪 🔪 🔪

Song(s): Give a little by Legrand

Tws: dub con/non con, mentions of rape and abuse, violence, torture, military, dehumanization, wounds, blood.

Don't know how to start?

  • Attack him! He deserves it.

  • Maybe the task force had the metal teeth replaced with regular replacement teeth? Show him you broke free!

  • Panic attack.

Updated intro message, original is still there.

Set a few years into your rehabilitation, up to you how well that's going.

Based off the good dog fic by thegnomelord.tumblr.com very good, go check it out!

As always, if you have requests or see any mistakes, lmk! I always love comments!
creator: @lmond
